product_overview: Backend API for a Pokémon team builder app that provides authentication, team persistence, user profiles, AI coach features, battle planning, and admin management. Endpoints enforce ownership, monthly AI quotas, and role-based admin restrictions.
core_goals: Secure user authentication and username management with Better Auth and username plugin rules.
CRUD for user teams and opponent teams with validation and ownership enforcement.
Expose user profile endpoints (public and private) with limits on editable fields and avatar validation.
Provide AI coach chat and full-team analysis with monthly quota tracking and message history.
Offer battle planner stateless matchup analysis and curated boss presets where available.
Admin endpoints for KPI overview, user listing/search, and entitlement/role management with strict permission checks.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Email/password sign-up and sign-in using Better Auth with username plugin, producing a session for protected routes.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/sign-up/email with valid email,password,username -> Receive 201 with session cookie/JWT -> GET /api/profiles/me with session -> Receive 200 and user profile
POST /api/auth/sign-up/email with username that already exists -> Receive 400/409 with validation error (username taken)
POST /api/auth/sign-in/email with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with session cookie/JWT -> GET /api/teams with session -> Receive 200 and user's teams
POST /api/auth/sign-in/email with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Team CRUD
features.description: Authenticated users can create, list, read, update, and delete their saved Pokémon teams with strict validation (1-6 Pokémon, stat caps, name length).
user_flows: POST /api/teams with Authorization header and payload {name, generation, pokemon:[...1-6...]} -> Receive 201 with created team ID
GET /api/teams with Authorization header -> Receive 200 with list that includes the created team
GET /api/teams/:id with Authorization header for owner -> Receive 200 with full team data
PUT /api/teams/:id with Authorization header and updated payload -> Receive 200 with updated team
DELETE /api/teams/:id with Authorization header -> Receive 204 No Content -> GET /api/teams/:id with Authorization header -> Receive 404 Not Found
POST /api/teams with Authorization header and payload containing pokemon:[] -> Receive 400 validation error (must contain 1-6 Pokémon)
POST /api/teams without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
GET /api/teams?generation=2 with Authorization header -> Receive 200 with only the authenticated user's teams filtered by generation

features.name: User Profile
features.description: Read and update authenticated user's profile (bio, avatar, favorites) and fetch public profiles by username; username changes are rate-limited and validated.
user_flows: GET /api/profiles/me with Authorization header -> Receive 200 with user profile and AI usage snapshot
PUT /api/profiles/me with Authorization header and payload {bio<=240, avatarUrl, favoriteGameIds<=3, favoritePokemonNames<=6} -> Receive 200 with updated profile
PUT /api/profiles/me with Authorization header and payload {bio: string >240 chars} -> Receive 400 validation error (bio too long)
POST /api/profiles/me/username with Authorization header and payload {username:new_valid_username} -> Receive 200 with username updated
POST /api/profiles/me/username with Authorization header and payload {username:already_taken} -> Receive 409 Conflict (username taken)
POST /api/profiles/me/username with Authorization header when user exceeded 2 changes in 30 days -> Receive 429 Too Many Requests (username change rate limit)

GET /api/profiles/:username without Authorization or with Authorization -> Receive 200 with public trainer profile for existing username -> GET /api/profiles/:nonexistentUsername -> Receive 404 Not Found

features.name: AI Coach Chat
features.description: Authenticated AI chat and full-team analysis endpoints that enforce monthly quotas, return message history per team, and validate message size/type filters.
user_flows: GET /api/ai/usage with Authorization header -> Receive 200 with monthly quota snapshot (chatCount, analyzeCount, remaining)
GET /api/ai/messages with Authorization header and query ?teamId=TEAM_ID -> Receive 200 with up-to-50 recent messages for the team
POST /api/ai/chat with Authorization header and payload {teamId, message<=2000 chars, contextOptions} -> Receive 200 with assistant reply and updated usage counts
POST /api/ai/analyze with Authorization header and payload {teamId, options} -> Receive 200 with detailed analysis output and analyzeCount increment
POST /api/ai/chat with Authorization header and payload {message length > 2000} -> Receive 400 validation error (message too long)
GET /api/ai/usage with Authorization header showing remaining chat quota = 0 -> POST /api/ai/chat with Authorization header -> Receive 403 Forbidden or 429 indicating monthly quota exhausted
POST /api/ai/analyze when monthly analyze limit reached (per GET /api/ai/usage) -> Receive 403 Forbidden or 429 indicating analyze quota exhausted

features.name: Battle Planner
features.description: Stateless type-effectiveness matchup analysis, curated boss presets for supported gens, and CRUD for saved opponent teams with realism checks in strict mode.
user_flows: GET /api/battle/presets with query ?gen=3&gameId=hoenn -> Receive 200 with supported=true and presets for gym/elite4/champion
GET /api/battle/presets with query for unsupported gen (e.g., gen=9) -> Receive 200 with supported=false
POST /api/battle/matchups/analyze with payload {attackingTeam, defendingTeam, mode:'sandbox'} -> Receive 200 with matchup predictions labeled win/lean-win/even/lean-loss/loss for all pairings
POST /api/battle/matchups/analyze with payload {team data, mode:'strict'} that violates level caps -> Receive 200 with predictions plus realism warnings about level-cap violations

POST /api/battle/opponent-teams with Authorization header and valid payload -> Receive 201 with created opponent team ID -> GET /api/battle/opponent-teams with Authorization header -> Receive 200 list that includes the new opponent team
PUT /api/battle/opponent-teams/:id with Authorization header and updated payload -> Receive 200 with updated opponent team
DELETE /api/battle/opponent-teams/:id with Authorization header -> Receive 204 No Content -> GET /api/battle/opponent-teams with Authorization header -> Receive 200 list without deleted team
POST /api/battle/opponent-teams without Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Role-restricted admin endpoints for KPIs, user listing/search, and modifying user entitlements or roles; OWNER-only constraints apply for role changes.
user_flows: GET /api/admin/overview with Authorization header for ADMIN -> Receive 200 with KPI daily trends and top users for requested date range
GET /api/admin/users with Authorization header for ADMIN and query ?page=1&search=term -> Receive 200 with paginated user list matching search
PATCH /api/admin/users/:id/entitlements with Authorization header for ADMIN and payload {plan, aiQuota} -> Receive 200 with updated entitlements
PATCH /api/admin/users/:id/role with Authorization header for OWNER and payload {role:'ADMIN'} -> Receive 200 with role updated
GET /api/admin/overview with Authorization header for non-admin user -> Receive 403 Forbidden
PATCH /api/admin/users/:id/role with Authorization header for ADMIN (not OWNER) -> Receive 403 Forbidden (OWNER-only)
PATCH /api/admin/users/:id/role attempting to remove the last OWNER -> Receive 400/409 with rejection (prevent removing last OWNER)

tech_stack.other: Better Auth, OpenAI SDK, PostHog, hono-rate-limiter

routes.description: Better Auth sign-up, sign-in, session management, username plugin
List user teams with optional generation/gameId filter or count aggregation
Get, update, or delete a specific team
Get or update the authenticated user's full profile
Get a public trainer profile by username
Get AI chat history for a team
Get checkpoint boss list for a game version
Get monthly AI quota snapshot for the current user
Send a chat message to the AI coach with team context
Request full team analysis from the AI coach
Get gym/elite4/champion boss presets for a game
List, create, update, or delete saved opponent teams
Update or delete a specific opponent team
Admin KPI dashboard with daily trends and top users
Update a user's plan and AI quota entitlements (ADMIN+)

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Sign up and sign in via email/password using Better Auth with username plugin
test_cases: Register a new user with valid email, password, and username
Reject registration with a username that already exists
Reject registration with an invalid username (too short, special chars)
Sign in with valid credentials returns a session
Sign in with invalid credentials returns 401
Unauthenticated requests to protected routes return 401

features.name: Team CRUD
features.description: Create, read, update, and delete Pokemon teams for authenticated users
test_cases: Create a valid team with 1-6 Pokemon and receive 201
Reject team creation with no Pokemon (empty array)
Reject team creation with invalid stat values (>500)
Reject team creation with name exceeding 80 chars
List teams returns only the authenticated user's teams
Filter teams by generation returns correct subset
Update a team's name and Pokemon array successfully
Delete a team returns success and removes it from list
Get team by ID returns 404 for non-existent or other user's team

features.name: User Profile
features.description: Read and update user profile including bio, avatar, favorites, and username
test_cases: GET /api/profiles/me returns correct user data and AI usage snapshot
Update bio within 240 chars succeeds
Reject bio update exceeding 240 chars
Update username successfully with valid value
Reject username update to an already-taken username
Reject more than 2 username changes within 30 days
Update favorite games with up to 3 entries succeeds
Reject favorite games with more than 3 entries
Update favorite Pokemon with up to 6 entries succeeds
Reject favorite Pokemon exceeding 6 entries
Public profile GET returns profile for existing username
Public profile GET returns 404 for non-existent username
Reject avatar URL from untrusted host

features.name: AI Coach Chat
features.description: Authenticated AI chat and team analysis with monthly quota enforcement
test_cases: GET /api/ai/usage returns quota snapshot with used/remaining counts
GET /api/ai/messages returns conversation history for a team
Reject chat message exceeding 2000 chars
Reject type filter with more than 6 types
Quota check blocks request when monthly chat limit is reached
Quota check blocks request when monthly analyze limit is reached

features.name: Battle Planner
features.description: Stateless matchup analysis and CRUD for opponent teams with preset boss rosters
test_cases: GET /api/battle/presets returns supported=true and presets for a supported game
GET /api/battle/presets returns supported=false for unsupported game
POST /api/battle/matchups/analyze in sandbox mode returns predictions for all matchups
POST /api/battle/matchups/analyze in strict mode with level-cap violation returns realism warnings
POST /api/battle/matchups/analyze returns win/lean-win/even/lean-loss/loss labels
Create opponent team with valid data returns 201
List opponent teams returns only the authenticated user's opponent teams
Delete opponent team returns success and removes it

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Role-restricted admin endpoints for KPI overview, user management, and entitlement updates
test_cases: Non-admin user receives 403 on all /api/admin/* routes
ADMIN user can access /api/admin/overview with valid range param
ADMIN user can list and search users
ADMIN user can update user plan and quota entitlements
Only OWNER can change user roles
Prevent removing the last OWNER account

known_limitations.issue: Matchup analysis uses stat+type heuristic only — no abilities, items, or movesets
known_limitations.impact: Predictions are approximate; edge cases with abilities (Levitate, Flash Fire) are ignored

known_limitations.issue: AI quota uses UTC monthly periods with no daily caps
known_limitations.impact: Users can exhaust entire monthly quota in a single session

known_limitations.issue: Message history capped at 50 per conversation; oldest are pruned silently
Battle preset rosters only curated for Gens 1-5; Gens 6-9 return supported=false
known_limitations.impact: Battle Planner preset mode not available for newer generations
